name: Euclid's Elements Book IV — Propositions 6–16
description: Dependency graph for propositions 6–16. Square, pentagon (IV.10 uses Prop II.11), hexagon, 15-gon. IV.11←IV.2,IV.10; IV.16←IV.1,IV.2,IV.11.
